detail: constexpr lambda with uninitialized float variable causes compile failure; ncrisc build failed
compute_kernel_api/common.h not found; need correct include path
AddScalar aggregate init failed; fixed via explicit field assignment
First test case passing: single_tile (1,1,32,32) with G=1, gamma+beta, TILE_LAYOUT
safe_pytest reported timeout 143, triage callstacks empty (likely already reset). need to narrow down case

TRISC0 stuck at cb_wait_front in sub<NONE>(input,means_T) at compute line 396. Reader stuck on cb_reserve_back. Root cause: tilize<1, gamma_rm, gamma_tile>(1) is SYMMETRIC mode (expects 1 tile-page), but CB has 32 row-pages (64 bytes each). Should use asymmetric: tilize(1, 32).

fix: switched gamma/beta/input tilize calls to asymmetric mode (total_input_pages=32) to match the row-sized CB pages

detail: All TILE-related cases pass: tile_layout cases (3 affine modes x 9 shapes) plus partial rm matches. 36 passed, 22 deselected.
All 54 acceptance tests + 4 ValueError tests pass. Includes all 9 shapes x 2 layouts x 3 affine modes plus c_non_aligned cases with (C/G)%32 != 0.

summary: Refinement 1 plan: (1) op file - add fp32+bf8b to SUPPORTED dtype and affine_dtype, EXCLUSIONS for bf8b+c_non_aligned/hw_non_aligned cells; (2) entry point accepts compute_kernel_config; (3) program descriptor accepts compute_kernel_config, sets ComputeConfigDescriptor with math_fidelity/fp32_dest_acc_en/math_approx_mode/dst_full_sync_en, sets Float32 format for stats/scratch CBs when fp32_dest_acc_en, tags UnpackToDestFp32 on stats accumulator CBs; (4) precision matrix test added

detail: ComputeConfigDescriptor Python binding only accepts (math_fidelity, math_approx_mode, fp32_dest_acc_en, dst_full_sync_en, bfp8_pack_precise) — no unpack_to_dest_mode kwarg in constructor. Need to find setter or alternative API.

PCC=NaN on bf16 (1,1,32,32) G=1 TILE+gamma_beta. The single-tile test that was the simplest baseline failed after enabling fp32_dest_acc_en + UnpackToDestFp32 tags. Need to isolate whether the format change or the tagging is the cause.
fp32_dest_acc_en=False bf16 path produces max diff 0.027 — matches Phase 0 precision baseline. Format-derivation refactor is OK. Failure is specifically on fp32_dest_acc_en=True path.

fp32_dest_acc_en=True alone works (max diff 0.028 vs ref). Adding UnpackToDestFp32 tags on cb_running_acc_sum/sumsq/group_mean/rcp_std produces inf/1e37 values. Reduce helper Accumulate path likely reads cb_running_acc_sum via srcA-unpack (not copy_tile), incompatible with UnpackToDestFp32 tagging. Dropping all UnpackToDestFp32 tags for now and relying on Float32 L1 + fp32 dest for the precision win.
All acceptance tests pass with default config: fp32_dest_acc_en=True, all stats CBs at input dtype (Float32-on-stats interacts badly with helper Accumulate path so deferred).
All 4 baseline shapes pass PCC>=0.995 with fp32_dest_acc_en=True, bf16 stats CBs.

With fp32_dest_acc_en=True alone (no Float32 stats CBs): 1x1x4096x320 G=32 PCC=0.999774; 1x1x16384x320 G=32 PCC=0.991376; 1x1x4096x640 G=32 PCC=0.999643. 2 of 3 large SDXL shapes now pass golden 0.995 threshold. 1x1x16384x320 is borderline — verifier predicted this case needs two-pass variance refinement.
SDXL fail cells 4096x320 and 4096x640 now pass PCC>=0.995 with default config. compute_kernel_config plumbing tested for default + LoFi.

Refinement 1 partial landing. Checkbox [~]. fp32 dtype + compute_kernel_config + fp32_dest_acc_en default landed. bf8b dtype in SUPPORTED but EXCLUSIONS-gated. Float32 stats CBs deferred (helper Accumulate interaction). Two follow-up refinements filed: 1a (Float32 stats), 1b (bf8b activations).

note: baseline RM-affine path still passes after R2 CT-arg threading
TILE-affine smoke test passes — BroadcastDim::ROW path works for the single-tile case
Full TILE-affine sweep green — bf16 + fp32 affine work on both input layouts across aligned/non-aligned/SDXL shapes
bf8b affine across all 9 shapes (single_tile, multi_tile, sdxl, c_non_aligned, multi_batch) all PCC >= 0.99. no_affine smoke passes — CT-arg threading doesn't break no-affine path.
Full acceptance suite green — no regressions from R2 changes. RM affine + all input dtypes/layouts still pass.
Precision baseline holds (R1 PCC ≥ 0.9999 across the 4 reference shapes) — R2 CT-arg threading does not regress precision.
Collected 7237 golden cells. Test IDs use affine_layout=TILE form.
-k expression with = sign rejected by pytest. Will retry with quoted IDs.
-k expression affine_layout-TILE matches no test IDs because IDs use = not - as separator
Sampled golden cells for affine_layout=TILE (BFLOAT16/FLOAT32/BFLOAT8_B affine_dtypes, gamma_beta + gamma_only) all pass — confirms R2 cells flip from xfail to supported_pass.

All R2 axis values landed: affine_layout=TILE works with bf16/fp32/bf8b affine_dtype × {gamma_beta, gamma_only} × {input_tile, input_rm} across aligned + c_non_aligned shapes. 82/82 R2 tests, 58/58 acceptance, 4/4 precision baseline, 4/4 sampled golden — total 148/148 tests pass.
